name: iec-std-functions
description: IEC 61131-3 standard functions (ADD/SUB/MUX/SHL/CONCAT/...) — synthesized from strucpp's StdFunctionRegistry. No ST sources: every function is a compiler+runtime intrinsic. The .stlib exists purely so editor tooling can list, categorize, and type-check standard functions through the same path it uses for ordinary libraries.
